entry.title: Marvel Rivals Version 20260711 Balance Post
entry.content: ADJUSTMENTS In the wake of the Season 9 launch, our temporal scanners have been working overtime, analyzing battlefield telemetry and listening to chatter from you, the community. We've seen the meta shifting, and to ensure the combat arena remains as dynamic and competitive as possible, we are deploying this emergency hotfix. Rest assured, our Watchers will remain vigilant, and further recalibrations will be made as new threats emerge. GLOBAL CHANGES The front lines of Season 9 have been intens

entry.title: You can mod out the yellow filter in Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced
entry.content: fter Traffic and Breaking Bad used it for scenes set there it became know as "the Mexican filter", though it's sometimes used for scenes set in South Asia or anywhere a bit tropical. You may recognize it as "the piss filter" that stained the original incarnation of Deus Ex: Human Revolution. It's the yellow gradient that's usually intended to make things look warm, and it's not to everyone's taste. Like piss, I guess... Read more.

entry.title: Obsidian game director is sick of hearing bad takes about the state of the studio: 'The through line from KotOR2 to our current games is pretty clear'
entry.content: Earlier this month, Microsoft announced "the most significant restructure in Xbox history", which is what you call it when you lay off thousands of people and cut four game studios loose . Double Fine and Compulsion Games returned to their indie roots; Ninja Theory and Undead Labs were sold off. While it seemed at first like Obsidian Entertainment had avoided the headsman's axe, we soon found out they were also hit with plenty of layoffs of their own ... Read more.

entry.title: Warframe: demo z rozgrywki z Tau
entry.content: Tegoroczny główny pokaz TennoLive zabrał nas poza granice Systemu Origin do Tau, miejsca, które do tej pory istniało tylko w naszych snach (oraz wspomnieniach z Dawnego Pokoju). Dyrektorka ds. społeczności, Megan Everett, przeprowadziła Tenno przez ich pierwszą wyprawę do CAŁKOWICIE NOWEGO systemu gwiezdnego Warframe, oferującego nieznane dotąd światy do poznania podczas kształtowania nowego wątku fabularnego, który wykracza poza wszystko, co do tej pory było Ci zna. entry.title: Doświadczenie Przekaźnika TennoCon 2026
entry.content: Tegoroczne wydarzenie Przekaźnika TennoCon czeka! Dołącz do gry i udaj się na Przekaźnik TennoCon 2026 na orbicie Saturna, a następnie skieruj się do Suchego Doku i czekaj na show, które rozpocznie się już o 22:30 czasu polskiego. Uwaga: aby uzyskać dostęp do Przekaźnika, musisz wcześniej ukończyć przynajmniej jedną misję na Mapie Gwiezdnej! Do zobaczenia, Tenno!

entry.title: I've found my perfect summer game: A stomach-churning horror story about Czech train conductors built over a bafflingly deep simulation of a fictional subway
entry.content: I've developed a bit of a reputation among my coworkers for loving niche, lo-fi indie games that make you feel bad and gross and weird on the inside. I'm flattered to stand out in such a way, but I also don't ever want to be typecast. Anyway, Brno Transit is a game about being trapped underground with your nasty, weirdly sexual boss and neurotic coworkers as reality disintegrates around you... Read more.

entry.title: The Elder Scrolls Online's developer deserved better than to get sucker-punched by Microsoft twice in two years
entry.content: I'm somewhat prone to pessimism in this column, though that's not without cause. MMOs aren't exactly a dying breed, per se—we've got Guild Wars 3 to look forward to, and most of the old guard, while a little grey in the beard, have respectable playerbases and are thrumming with things to do... Read more.

entry.title: Reminder from Pops
entry.content: Reminder from Pops Pops reminds you that you can receive only 10 Pops' coins for completing Triumphs. The coins are distributed as follows: · 1 coin for completing the mandatory Triumph; · 4 coins for completing 4 advanced Triumphs; · 5 coins for completing 5 simple Triumphs. You can receive 1 additional coin for participating in the Faction Race. To do so, you need to complete 3 Triumphs and be a member of the Northern faction. entry.title: Community Crunch 514: The Belly of the Beast
entry.content: Don't let the sleepy eyes fool you. This hulking newcomer has an appetite that extends far beyond its next meal. Be careful when approaching it, as it has a habit of inhaling just about anything that stands in its path. From allies to trees, bushes, and resources, nothing is safe from its seemingly bottomless belly. entry.title: 'Surprised there was anyone left to post this': Fans react as The Elder Scrolls Online debuts seasonal content days after hundreds laid off from studio
entry.content: For the first time ever, seasonal content is here for The Elder Scrolls Online. Return of the Thieves Guild, its inaugural season, has launched for the long-running MMO, something you'd expect fans would be all abuzz for—if not for the fact that ZeniMax Online Studios has been gutted as part of the mass layoffs at Xbox this week... Read more.

entry.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced sells 2 million copies in 1 day and achieves the 'highest concurrent player count ever recorded for an Assassin's Creed title' on Steam
entry.content: I gotta hand this one to the suits: I thought gamers might find a $60 price tag on a rehash of a 13-year-old Assassin's Creed game to be a bit much, and apparently I was wrong. Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced sold more than two million copies in just one day, and has handily surpassed Steam player counts of newer games in the series, including Assassin's Creed Shadows... Read more.

entry.title: How to get hardwood in Palworld
entry.content: The Palworld 1.0 update sure is a big one, and with all of the new pals, weapons, and zones to track it's easy to miss the little things—like new resources for crafting. As I climbed the revamped tech tree again, I breezed through most recipes until I ran into hardwood. It's a new tier of the basic building block you'll see pop up in later level recipes (around 40 to 50), after planks... Read more.

entry.title: Indie dev defends criticism of Steam refund abuse amid review bombing of his game: 'It's wrong to refund a game after having fun with it and completing it'
entry.content: Developer Mateo Covic, who went viral for complaining that thousands of people had refunded his game after finishing it in less than two hours, says he's not actually unhappy about the number of refunds or money he lost, or even Steam's policy in general—he was merely expressing frustration with players who "bragged about having a fun time with the game and refunding it after completion.".. Read more.

entry.title: Marvel Rivals needs to pick a lane and either fully embrace balancing for 'fun' long term or stick to some serious changes

I'm certainly not a fan of chaos comp, but my wishes for NetEase to pick a lane are starting to supersede any desire for actual balance... Read more.

entry.title: How do you put a price tag on a legacy like id Software's?
entry.content: In 1984, an upstart retail company called Costco had just opened its first handful of voluminous warehouse stores on the west coast of the United States when it decided to try an experiment. It installed a hot dog cart in front of its San Diego store and started selling Hebrew Nationals with a drink for $1.50. People, it turned out, liked the hot dogs. The cart became Cafe 150, named for the combo price... Read more.

entry.title: Known Issue Update: Cutscenes Locked to 30FPS on PC (Workaround)
entry.content: Hello Assassins, We are aware that there is an issue where cutscenes on PC are locked to 30 FPS when using Raytracing, BVH or Terrain Quality at Ultra High setting. We have a fix coming soon, but in the meantime, we've provided a temporary workaround: Reset the graphics Overall Preset to any pre-configured setting and avoid manually setting Raytracing, BVH or Terrain Quality to the Ultra High setting. Thanks for your patience! Link to Known Issues: Day 1 Known Issues - AC Black Flag resynced ::

entry.title: An Update from the Anti Cheat Team - Auto Aim Manipulation
entry.content: Effective immediately, the use of “jitter aim” and/or RC filters to exploit aim assist systems and negate recoil on controllers is unequivocally considered cheating . We are taking a firm stance against players using these cheats and are taking action to stop them. Apex Legends is now equipped with the necessary in-game detections to identify and disable these exploits. Players who are caught attempting to use hardware or software to alter aim assist or recoil patterns will be flagged as cheater

entry.title: How to get Data Fragments in Black Flag Resynced
entry.content: I'm not sure who asked for daily quests and what is essentially a battle pass in Black Flag Resynced , but here we are. Similar to Shadows, you can earn Data Fragments to spend on unlocking special cosmetics and keys in your Animus projects... Read more.

entry.title: How to complete the Art Lover quest in Black Flag Resynced
entry.content: Completing the Art Lover quest in Black Flag Resynced sees you finding art pieces from Great Inagua's scattered collection to return them to the manor. This is one of the new quests that was added in Resynced, alongside a new character, Bernard. This aged butler served the previous owner of the house before Du Casse took it over... Read more.

entry.title: How to access Black Flag Resynced's new content in order
entry.content: Though it makes a variety of changes to the original, Black Flag Resynced adds quite a lot of new content to the much-beloved Assassin's Creed instalment. There's a boatload of new sidequests, including a whole new chapter you unlock later in the game. There are also tweaks to combat, stealth, the Jackdaw, and legendary ships ... Read more.

entry.title: How to beat all four legendary ships in Black Flag Resynced
entry.content: Legendary ships were the pinnacle challenge of the Caribbean in the original, and they return even stronger in Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced . These boss battles now have more unique gimmicks and phases, and pack a serious punch. But you've got a lot more tools of destruction to deal with them, the rewards have changed, and they now respawn so you can fight them again... Read more.

entry.title: How to get all 28 outfits in Black Flag Resynced
entry.content: Just like the original game, getting all the outfits isn't simple in Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced , but for a slightly different reason. Most outfits are still bought from the merchants or crafted, but a few have moved locations for no apparent reason... Read more.

entry.title: How to get all 12 Ultimate Ship Plans in Black Flag Resynced
entry.content: The Elite Ship Upgrades from the original game have been renamed in Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced . Now called Ultimate Ship Plans , these schematics still serve the same purpose: fully upgrading the Jackdaw. So you'll want to find each and every one of the locations if you're hoping to take on the legendary ships ... Read more.

entry.title: All 16 Mayan stone locations in Black Flag Resynced
entry.content: Finding all the Mayan stone locations is one of your big distractions while sailing the Caribbean in Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced , and it's mostly unchanged from the original game. You still need to solve 16 of these stele to complete the Mayan Mystery task and unlock the Mayan Armour, one of the best outfits . But just like the treasure maps , a few locations have shifted around in the remake... Read more.

entry.title: All 22 treasure map locations in Black Flag Resynced
entry.content: Is there anything more piratey than searching for buried treasure ? I think not. Digging up the treasure map locations was one of my favourite side activities in the original game, and that's not changed in Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced . If you completed everything in the original and thought you knew it like the back of your hand, you don't now. The tectonic plates have shifted, as the remake has moved the location of major islands, and the clues are different too... Read more.

entry.title: Where to find Blackbeard's Treasure in Black Flag Resynced
entry.content: Finding Blackbeard's Treasure in Black Flag Resynced is actually a lot tougher than the game's other treasure maps, mainly because it doesn't give you any coordinates, forcing you to rely on your knowledge of the Caribbean. This is a new quest that was added in Resynced, but you won't get it until after you complete the Do Not Go Gently main quest... Read more.

entry.title: Players prove Destiny 2 can still produce wonders with discovery of poopy pants transmog
entry.content: Destiny 2 has entered its long goodnight. Despite earlier assurances that Destiny 2 will "remain playable" for the foreseeable future, the studio now seems to be signaling that its ability to ensure the game's ongoing health is constrained. Even if Bungie and Sony had the will to ensure Destiny 2's sandbox stays fulfilling in its sunset years, they'd struggle to find someone to make it happen—because most of the Destiny team was cut loose last month ... entry.title: Xbox's Bethesda layoffs include the artist responsible for designing Skyrim's khajiit and argonians, who had been at the company for 27 years
entry.content: If you've ever liked the character designs of an Elder Scrolls game, chances are you've met with some of Christiane Meister's work—as a senior character artist, Meister's been with the company for 27 years (which is only four years fewer than I, the person writing this, have been alive ). She's worked on every game from Morrowind to Skyrim, and she was caught in the wave of Xbox's first round of layoffs this week... Read more.

entry.title: Excerpt from a Frontier Instructor's Journal
entry.content: Today we trained alongside the Typhoon operatives. I expected another batch of rookies decked out in expensive gear. I was wrong. They're well-trained, no doubt about it. But there's one key difference between us. They see the Zone as a mission. We know the Zone is a force of nature, and no amount of training or procedure can truly prepare you for it. We put their new suits through their paces. Impressive equipment. But when the batteries run dry and the electronics let you down, experience is a

entry.title: You're invited to Destiny's cursed unofficial final raid: Pete Carsons' Vault of Cars
entry.content: The reasons behind the decline and ultimate end of Destiny 2 will always be a topic of discussion. It's, in my opinion, one of the biggest fumbles in entertainment history. No one thing is to blame, but former Bungie CEO and avid car collector Pete Parsons , who retired in August 2025 as sentiment was at an all-time low and pressure from Sony grew, is the focus of much of the ire. "I hope all your cars break down," one player wrote in a cheerful farewell to the departing CEO last year, in a rare

entry.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced review
entry.content: ssassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced might go down as one of the more puzzling remakes ever conceived. Not only is it bizarre that Ubisoft decided to kick off a likely streak of remakes with the sixth game of the series, but it also chose a game so recently and universally enjoyed that the only way to "remake" it is to simply put out the same game again... entry.title: Former Elder Scrolls Online designer laments the destruction of layoffs: 'There’s really no one left and no changing it now'

Some trumpeted the fact that no studios were closed, although the practical impact of spinning them out to independence or new ownership remains to be seen, but that has no bearing on the blow to morale caused by such deep cuts to long-standing dev teams... This week we return to a past theme - vehicles in urban environments. Capture your vehicles in action amongst the many buildings and bridges! The three most popular and three selected by us will get 300 GE. See the winners down below! Let’s begin the 231st edition of our competition! entry.title: ARK Tides of Fortune, Dragontopia and Genesis Part 1 are out now!
entry.content: Pull up a chair, Survivors. Everyone knows the legendary ARK veteran Bob, played by Karl Urban, but you haven't truly heard a tale until you've survived his swashbuckling exploits on the high seas. Hoist the sails and experience his next chapter of incredibly true adventures in ARK Tides of Fortune! The simulated ocean of Genesis Ascended Part 1 has opened into a massive, map-wide nautical frontier. Chart a course across a vast sea, hunt for buried treasure, and clash with treacherous enemies in

entry.title: Mouthwashing's follow-up is self-described 'friendsweat' where 3 players struggle to operate a tank in a defiled city: 'We're definitely not quite at Peak, but we're not trying to make Arma either'
entry.content: head of Carcass Clad's reveal at last month's PC Gaming Show, I had the chance to speak to Wrong Organ devs Jeffrey Tomec and Dave van Egdom about the studio's follow-up to its breakout hit, Mouthwashing. Carcass Clad is a very different sort of game , but with familiar themes and atmosphere . The bulk of our conversation, though, was about why the studio pivoted to co-op multiplayer, and how it feels to play... Read more.

entry.title: Sand publisher celebrates 300,000 copies sold: 'We getting a half hour of air conditioning tonight!'
entry.content: X A couple weeks after its early access launch, things are going mostly pretty well for the steampunk-mechs-in-the-desert game Sand: Raiders of Sophie . An update that rolled out on July 2 caused some surprise headaches and had to be rolled back, which isn't great, but on the brighter side the game looks to be a legitimate hit, too... Read more.

entry.title: The Jackass Sticker Capsule
entry.content: Today we’re excited to release the Jackass Sticker Capsule in association with Paramount Games Studio, Jackass graphic artist Andy Jenkins, and community artist TheDanidem. Celebrating the release of jackass: best and last , the Jackass Sticker Capsule contains 39 stickers referencing iconic Jackass moments. Whether it’s an airhorn on a golf course or a trip down Electric Avenue, there’s something for every jackass in here; even you!

entry.title: OPEN GAME FEST 2026
entry.content: OPEN GAME FEST is an offline event held in Kyoto, designed to foster growth and boost motivation among game developers and students aiming to enter the industry. The event serves as a platform for both creators and the general public to discover brand-new games. This year, we are excited to introduce our very first online event page. Even if you cannot attend in person, you can still explore the exhibited titles in depth. We hope you enjoy the event!

entry.title: Cyberpunk 2077 has now sold more than 40 million copies, 'a testament to what CD Projekt does best'
entry.content: It's hard to imagine now, but Cyberpunk 2077 was an unmitigated disaster when it launched back in 2020. The PC version wasn't too bad, relatively speaking, but the console version was so wretched that Sony literally kicked it off the PlayStation Store . It was so far gone that several months after launch, with CD Projekt just beginning to start the work of cleaning up the mess it made, we recommended that it just fix the bugs and move on . Whoops ... Read more.

entry.title: EVE Online studio Fenris follows through on yearslong promise to make its in-house game engine fully open source
entry.content: On July 1, Fenris Creations (formerly CCP) completed the full open source release of its in-house Carbon Engine, the tech behind long-running MMO EVE Online and early access space survival game EVE Frontier. The Carbon Engine's repositories are available now on GitHub ... Read more.

entry.title: Community Exhibit Vol. 26
entry.content: Welcome back, Officers. It’s summer in the northern hemisphere, so many of us at VOID are trying to stay cool. We hope you can do the same. While we’re hard at work on what’s next for Ready or Not, we’ve got another community exhibit for you to highlight what’s going on in, and around, the RoN community. ﻿ Stack Up Partnership We’re thrilled to announce that we’re working with a new charity partner, Stack Up. Stack Up supports US and Allied veterans by promoting positive mental health and combat

entry.title: Reward Car Build July 3rd
entry.content: This handling build for the 2005 Mitsubishi #1 Sierra Sierra Enterprises Lancer Evolution Time Attack, created by R e Z o a K, excels at handling. Try it out using Share Code 974 062 451.

entry.title: PUBG EMEA CHAMPIONSHIP & PUBG AMERICAS SERIES RETURNS
entry.content: PEC: Fall and PAS2 returns to give teams from across EMEA and Americas the opportunity to prove themselves and compete for a chance to earn PGC Points to qualify for the PUBG Global Championship 2026 in Istanbul, Türkiye. With so much on the line, we hope you are as excited as we are for the tournament to kick off. Whether you are an established roster or an up-and-coming squad looking to make your mark, this is your chance to compete against the region's best and begin or continue your journey

entry.title: UK Rework Project: Inverness
entry.content: We hope you've packed a warm jacket and perhaps a wee bit of shortbread, because today we're taking you to the Scottish Highlands! We're excited to share with you a closer look at Inverness, a brand-new city arriving as part of our upcoming UK Rework project for Euro Truck Simulator 2 . Let's take a closer look at what this destination has to offer drivers. Known as the "Gateway to the Highlands", Inverness serves as an important hub for transport, tourism, and industry in the north of Scotland.

entry.title: Watch the Challenger League Major II and Earn Twitch Drops!
entry.content: The Challenger League Major II is here, and the competition is about to reach its most exciting stage! Every match matters as they fight for valuable league points, prestige, and a chance to establish themselves among the Challenger League's elite.
